preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Bioequivalence Laboratory' AND is_template = true

column.name: objective
column.value: Complete bioequivalence study testing workflow from sample reception to archiving

column.name: content
column.value: Bioequivalence Laboratory notebook template with 5 predefined workflow pages for bioequivalence study sample reception, test assignment, analytical execution, reporting, and storage/archiving.

changeSet.author: openelis-bioequivalence

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Bioequivalence Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Bioequivalence Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 1

changeSet.comment: Create Sample Reception page for Bioequivalence Laboratory notebook

column.name: instructions
column.value: Register bioequivalence study sample receipt: Assign or retain Sample ID, capture sample type (API, tablet, plasma, serum, etc.), note source (Medical Lab or clinical site), record requested bioequivalence tests, document storage condition on arrival, receipt date/time, and receiving personnel. Link to bioequivalence study protocol.

column.name: content
column.value: Sample Reception - Batch verification and metadata capture of incoming bioequivalence study samples

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Bioequivalence Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Bioequivalence Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 1

changeSet.author: openelis-bioequivalence

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Bioequivalence Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Bioequivalence Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 2

changeSet.comment: Create Test Assignment page for Bioequivalence Laboratory notebook

column.name: instructions
column.value: Assign bioequivalence tests to analysts by test category. Select analytical method (LC-MS/MS, HPLC, dissolution apparatus, etc.) from dropdown. Specify instrument ID, calibration status. Document sample preparation methodology for bioequivalence studies. Define QC requirements (calibration curve criteria, control samples). Set expected analysis date.

column.name: content
column.value: Test Assignment - Methodology selection and analyst assignment for bioequivalence testing

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Bioequivalence Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Bioequivalence Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 2

changeSet.author: openelis-bioequivalence

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Bioequivalence Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Bioequivalence Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 3

changeSet.comment: Create Analytical Execution page for Bioequivalence Laboratory notebook

column.name: instructions
column.value: Record execution date/time and analyst ID for bioequivalence testing. Upload or link calibration curve details (r² value, slope, intercept, acceptance criteria). Document QC sample results (Low/Medium/High concentrations) with acceptance limits. Upload raw data files (chromatograms, spectra). Record calculated results with units. Document any deviations. Verify ALCOA+ compliance (Attributable, Legible, Contemporaneous, Original, Accurate, Complete).

column.name: content
column.value: Analytical Execution - Raw data capture and QC validation for bioequivalence studies

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Bioequivalence Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Bioequivalence Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 3

changeSet.author: openelis-bioequivalence

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Bioequivalence Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Bioequivalence Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 4

changeSet.comment: Create Reporting & Release page for Bioequivalence Laboratory notebook

column.name: instructions
column.value: Compile all bioequivalence study results. Validate against acceptance criteria. Perform Primary Review (analyst validation). Perform Secondary Review (senior scientist/QA). Obtain Final Approval (lab manager/study director). Select result distribution method (email, REDCap, LMIS integration, regulatory submission). Generate bioequivalence performance metrics dashboard. Document data integrity and audit trail.

column.name: content
column.value: Reporting & Release - Bioequivalence result compilation, validation, and report generation with embedded dashboard

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Bioequivalence Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Bioequivalence Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 4

changeSet.author: openelis-bioequivalence

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Bioequivalence Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Bioequivalence Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 5

changeSet.comment: Create Post-Test Storage & Archiving page for Bioequivalence Laboratory notebook

column.name: instructions
column.value: Document quantity retained for storage from bioequivalence study. Determine transfer to biorepository (long-term storage at -80°C for biological samples, room temperature for pharmaceutical). Record storage location hierarchy (Room → Freezer → Shelf → Rack → Box → Position). Set retention period (2 years for bioequivalence studies, 5-10 years for regulatory, or custom). Set up environmental monitoring. Document raw data archiving locations. Record disposal criteria and methods. Maintain sample-result traceability.

column.name: content
column.value: Post-Test Storage & Archiving - Storage tracking, retention periods, and data archiving for bioequivalence samples

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Bioequivalence Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Bioequivalence Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 5
